heading: Definitions

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “breach” means the unauthorized acquisition, access, use, or disclosure of protected health information which compromises the security or privacy of such information, except where an unauthorized person to whom such information is disclosed would not reasonably have been able to retain such information.

children.label: I
children.text: such acquisition, access, or use was made in good faith and within the course and scope of the employment or other professional relationship of such employee or individual, respectively, with the covered entity or business associate; and

children.label: II
children.text: such information is not further acquired, accessed, used, or disclosed by any person; or

children.label: ii
children.text: any inadvertent disclosure from an individual who is otherwise authorized to access protected health information at a facility operated by a covered entity or business associate to another similarly situated individual at same facility; and1So in original. Probably should be followed by “the”.1

children.label: iii
children.text: any such information received as a result of such disclosure is not further acquired, accessed, used, or disclosed without authorization by any person.

children.heading: Business associate
children.label: 2 Business associate
children.text: The term “business associate” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Covered entity
children.label: 3 Covered entity
children.text: The term “covered entity” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Disclose
children.label: 4 Disclose
children.text: The terms “disclose” and “disclosure” have the meaning given the term “disclosure” in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Electronic health record
children.label: 5 Electronic health record
children.text: The term “electronic health record” means an electronic record of health-related information on an individual that is created, gathered, managed, and consulted by authorized health care clinicians and staff.

children.heading: Health care operations
children.label: 6 Health care operations
children.text: The term “health care operation” has the meaning given such term in section 164.501 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Health care provider
children.label: 7 Health care provider
children.text: The term “health care provider” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Health plan
children.label: 8 Health plan
children.text: The term “health plan” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: National Coordinator
children.label: 9 National Coordinator
children.text: The term “National Coordinator” means the head of the Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology established under , as added by section 13101.section 300jj–11(a) of this title2See References in Text note below.2

children.heading: Payment
children.label: 10 Payment
children.text: The term “payment” has the meaning given such term in section 164.501 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Personal health record
children.label: 11 Personal health record
children.text: The term “personal health record” means an electronic record of PHR identifiable health information (as defined in ) on an individual that can be drawn from multiple sources and that is managed, shared, and controlled by or primarily for the individual.section 17937(f)(2) of this title

children.heading: Protected health information
children.label: 12 Protected health information
children.text: The term “protected health information” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 13 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: Security
children.label: 14 Security
children.text: The term “security” has the meaning given such term in section 164.304 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: State
children.label: 15 State
children.text: The term “State” means each of the several States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and the Northern Mariana Islands.

children.heading: Treatment
children.label: 16 Treatment
children.text: The term “treatment” has the meaning given such term in section 164.501 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Use
children.label: 17 Use
children.text: The term “use” has the meaning given such term in section 160.103 of title 45, Code of Federal Regulations.

children.heading: Vendor of personal health records
children.label: 18 Vendor of personal health records
children.text: The term “vendor of personal health records” means an entity, other than a covered entity (as defined in paragraph (3)), that offers or maintains a personal health record.
